title: After the Yasuda Kinen: A Triumphant Bath

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I did it! I beat Ikuno! Hip, hip, mun!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It would appear I still need to make some
adjustments.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Tannhauser. It's been a pleasure
running with you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? You sound so stiff.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...I was in peak condition for today's race.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But even so, I lost. It would be a lie to say I'm not
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But I can't allow myself to lose heart. Especially in
front of someone as optimistic as you.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to running with you again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Same here.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
By the way, there's somewhere I'd like to go on
the way back. Would you care to join me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Where's that?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: A bathhouse.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
From the heat of the bath to the pressure of the
water, it is a multifaceted approach to relaxing
your body.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The better you are able to relax, the better you
can sleep. That, in turn, improves your
concentration and prevents potential future
injuries.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, when you're tired, you need to
recover. That cycle helps maintain better health
going forward.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I-I see!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've decided, let's hurry up and go.
Taking a bath for too long can have the opposite
effect, so make sure not to stay in too long.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Haaah... It's so waaarm. I can feel it right down
into my bones.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I bet I'm gonna sleep real well tonight...
Mm-hmm...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That is the most important thing... But
don't sleep in the bath, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them warm both their bodies and souls
in the bath, reinvigorating themselves for their
upcoming races.
